title: MP tells Commons she waited 1,088 days for her rape case to reach court
description: Charlotte Nichols opposes plan to cut jury trials in England and Wales and calls for creation of special courts to hear rape cases
content:
An MP has told the House of Commons that she was raped after an event that she attended as a member of parliament, revealing that she waited 1,088 days for her case to get to court.

title: Farage delivers energy sermon at the pump - just don’t mention the war
description: Reform leader’s Derbyshire petrol station stunt grinds to halt when questions on Iran leave him short-tempered
content: Let’s try to look on the bright side. At least Nigel Farage wasn’t personally out of pocket. There again, he seldom is. The whole point of being Nige is to never pay for anything if you can help it. Unless you fancy buying a few shares in Kwasi Kwart... [6146 chars]

title: NYPD says suspicious device reported near Zohran Mamdani’s residence is ‘non-threatening’
description: New York police responded to an alert days after two men threw homemade explosives at Gracie Mansion
content:
The New York police department determined that a suspicious device reported near Gracie Mansion on Tuesday afternoon was “non-threatening”.
“This was an instance of everyday New Yorkers following a clear message: if you see something, say something,”... [3182 chars]

title: Jury restriction plan clears first hurdle despite Labour dissent
description: The justice secretary says the limits are required to stem a growing backlog of cases in crown courts.
content:
MPs have voted to allow a bill that would curb access to jury trials in England and Wales to progress to the next stage, despite some Labour MPs stating their opposition to the reforms.
The Courts and Tribunals Bill passed by 304 votes to 203, a majo... [5778 chars]

title: Tehran endures ‘worst night of strikes’ amid mixed US messages about more to come
description: Hegseth follows Trump’s suggestion war will soon be over by saying US will not stop until Iran ‘decisively defeated’
